# Sift Ranked #1 in Fraud Detection | G2 Grid® Spring 2026

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

G2 has named Sift a Leader in the Spring 2026 Fraud Detection Grid, validating what customers experience every day: stronger fraud decisions, less friction for trusted users, and revenue protection. Based on real user reviews and trusted third-party data, this recognition reflects Sift’s ability to stop fraud while keeping digital experiences fast and seamless.

Why buyers ranked Sift #1 in Fraud Detection:

*   Stronger decisions that separate trusted customers from fraud in real time
*   Less friction across sign-up, login, and checkout
*   Real revenue protection that supports safe, scalable growth

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
